title: Dessert UI
description: A personalized cartoon UI resource pack
body:
Dessert UI is a personalized low-saturation cartoon UI resource pack. It modifies Minecraft's UI to make it more cartoonish and aesthetically pleasing. # Q&A > **Q:** Why are some UI elements missing? > > **A:** The current release of Dessert UI is a test version, so not all UI elements have been modified yet. We are currently working as quickly as possible to add them.
> **Q:** Which versions are compatible? > > **A:** It is compatible with the latest major Java versions. Future support will include versions before 1.21.
> **Q:** Will there be a Dessert resource pack? > > **A:** There are currently no plans to create what you might call a "Dessert" resource pack. However, we may consider this option after completing Dessert UI.
> **Q:** I want to make a request/suggestion. > > **A:** Please join my Discord; I am very open to everyone's help in improving this resource pack :), but as a student, my English is not great, so my responses might be slow, please understand.
> **Q:** Can other versions be used? > >**A:** I'm not sure if there may be issues in lower versions due to the use of advanced features. I will port all mainstream versions in the official version. Please stay tuned:)
